form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 7 length third but did clock a handy 22.73 over the 400m journey. Expected to go close with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 5 length second (22.85) over 400m at this track. Has a strong record from box 2, including two wins. Winning hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on March 31 over 485m at Horsham behind Doongalla Rocket beaten 5 lengths (27.51). Has clocked an excellent 22.49 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.79) at this track in a Special conditions Veteran race, finishing second and beaten 3.5 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on March 31 over 400m at this track behind Paw Gusto beaten 5.5 lengths (22.90). Placed two back at this track. Recorded three placings in a row prior to the latest effort. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Mt Gambier (23.07) in a Grade 5, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Has five minors from eight starts from box 8. Can feature in the finish.
